authenticated_supplied_corpus.scope: 328 supplied source records and their 328 derived complements only; not corpus completeness

canonicalizer.version_probe: >Z 0 graphs labelled from stdin to stdout in 0.00 sec.

claim_scope: the frozen Springer Supplementary Data 4 K43 seed and exactly its 903 one-edge flips; not a larger Hamming ball, global optimum, Ramsey witness, bound, or complete order-42 census

direct_rescan_controls.selection: every distinct global burden class representative plus every minimizer from all three recorded families

independence: Checker A parses raw publisher whitespace in Python and scans C(43,5) subsets once with exact one-edge deltas; Checker B separately parses fixed raw byte positions in C and recursively enumerates graph/complement K5s afresh for each flip.

nonbinary.checker_a: ValueError: row 0 is not exactly 43 single-space-delimited bits

short_row.checker_a: ValueError: row 0 is not exactly 43 single-space-delimited bits
short_row.checker_b: publisher_radius1_b: row does not have the exact frozen width

substituted_gist.checker_a: ValueError: publisher matrix must have one title and 43 rows

source_and_parser_rejections.valid_matrix_but_altered_body_rejected_b: body does not match the frozen publisher object
